The product is Route orchestration software. The market is Enterprise logistics.

This message is for a US launch across United States and Canada. Industries include Retail and Third-party logistics. Company size is 1000+.

Titles include VP Logistics and Director of Transportation; functions include Operations and Supply Chain; seniorities are Director and VP.
Keywords include route optimization and last mile logistics. Pains include manual dispatch exceptions and high cost-to-serve. Triggers include SLA pressure and mixed fleet complexity.

The campaign goal is Pipeline creation. Preferred channels include linkedin-ads, microsoft-ads, and google-ads-youtube.
